entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop produced in semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where pearl millet is produced.

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A heterothallic pathogen that causes Downy mildew in pearl millet.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A biotic constraint/disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to withstand virulent isolates of Sclerospora graminicola.

entities.name: GENETIC MARKER TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Advances used to manipulate oligogenic and quantitative traits in plant breeding.

entities.name: GENOMIC SSRS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers derived from genomic DNA used for linkage mapping.

entities.name: EST SSRS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers derived from Expressed Sequence Tags used for linkage mapping.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map showing the relative positions of marker loci on chromosomes.

entities.name: F8 RIL PROGENIES
entities.description: A mapping population of 188 recombinant inbred lines used for map construction.

entities.name: ICMB 89111-P6
entities.description: One of the parental lines used to create the RIL population.

entities.name: ICMB 90111-P6
entities.description: One of the parental lines used to create the RIL population.

entities.name: JOINMAP
entities.description: Software used to construct the skeleton linkage map.

entities.name: MAPMAKER/EXP
entities.description: Software used to construct the skeleton linkage map.

entities.name: MAP CHART
entities.description: Software used to draw the constructed linkage map.

entities.name: LOD THRESHOLD
entities.description: The statistical threshold value used in JoinMap for linkage analysis.
